case_title: LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC VS. LAN T PHAN et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT; COMPUTATION OF INTEREST; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (B) (2) AND ; ATTORNEY'S FEES PURSUANT TO CC 1717 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100038371) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PHAN, LAN T NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100050029) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC SERVED AUG-14-2019, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT PHAN, LAN T PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON SEP-19-2019 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC SERVED AUG-12-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PHAN, LAN T

DECLARATION PER CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PHAN, LAN T DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-27-2009

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHAN, LAN T $5,034.05 PRINCIPAL, $850.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,120.66 INTEREST, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,244.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PHAN, LAN T
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100038371)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHAN, LAN T $14,373.01 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,373.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
